market_brief.summary_en: Mixed regime at 49.5/100 with SPY and QQQ on distribution days (DANGER) and fearful sentiment at -1.3.
key_themes_en: VIX at 18.63 with 10Y at 4.40% and DXY at 101.59
Bitcoin at $60,866.22 down 2.88% today and 4.21% over five days
market_brief.watch_points_en: MU post-market at $1,203.40 after 2026-06-24 announcement (est. EPS $20.28)

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $440.83 with post-market at $453.92. All moving averages above price with EMA200 rising and golden cross above. Optimistic social sentiment driven by TSMC exercising pricing power on advanced nodes amid AI demand plus positive spillover from Micron's strong HBM results and TSMC collaboration.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM 전일종가 $440.83, 포스트 $453.92. 모든 이평선 위에 EMA200 상승 중이며 GC 위. AI 수요 속 선진 노드 가격 결정력 행사와 마이크론 HBM 협력으로 낙관적 소셜 심리.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above $453.92 post-market with EMA21 $430.53 support

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $199.00 with post-market at $200.36. Price below moving averages yet EMA200 rising with volume contraction near 52-week high. Optimistic social sentiment on strong AI infrastructure dominance and reasonable valuation.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA 전일종가 $199.00, 포스트 $200.36. 이평선 아래이나 EMA200 상승 중이며 거래량 수축. AI 인프라 지배력으로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $557.67 with post-market at $558.25. Price below all moving averages with volume contraction. Optimistic social sentiment on AI ad monetization progress and attractive valuation.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META 전일종가 $557.67, 포스트 $558.25. 모든 이평선 아래 거래량 수축. AI 광고 수익화 진전으로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $375.53 with post-market at $377.50. Price below moving averages near 52-week high. Optimistic social sentiment on defensive pushback on NTSB crash probe mixed with strong excitement for Optimus, Robotaxi and FSD success stories.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSLA 전일종가 $375.53, 포스트 $377.50. 이평선 아래 52주 고점 인근. NTSB 조사 방어와 옵티머스 로보택시 FSD 기대감으로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $113.50 with post-market at $112.80. Price below all moving averages. Optimistic social sentiment from long-term investors accumulating on the pullback citing commercial AIP momentum, Zeta partnership, and attractive valuation after guidance raise.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: PLTR 전일종가 $113.50, 포스트 $112.80. 모든 이평선 아래. 상업 AIP 모멘텀과 제타 파트너십, 가이던스 상향 후 저가 매수로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,048.51 with post-market at $1,203.40. All moving averages above price with EMA200 rising and golden cross above near 52-week high. MU reported after close today (est. EPS $20.28 — verify actual at broker) driving euphoric sentiment on AI memory demand.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MU 전일종가 $1,048.51, 포스트 $1,203.40. 모든 이평선 위 EMA200 상승 GC 위 52주 고점 인근. 오늘 장 마감 후 발표됨 — EPS 추정 $20.28, 실제 결과 확인 필요. AI 메모리 수요로 열광적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $673.02 with post-market at $670.00. All moving averages above price with EMA200 rising, golden cross above and volume contraction near 52-week high. Optimistic social sentiment on AI security leadership, threat reports, and upcoming 4-for-1 stock split.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: CRWD 전일종가 $673.02, 포스트 $670.00. 모든 이평선 위 EMA200 상승 GC 위 거래량 수축 52주 고점 인근. AI 보안 리더십과 위협 보고서, 4-for-1 스플릿으로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $234.27 with post-market at $234.92. Price below moving averages with EMA200 rising near 52-week high. Optimistic social sentiment from Prime Day record sales and CEO update on India quick-commerce growth.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: AMZN 전일종가 $234.27, 포스트 $234.92. 이평선 아래 EMA200 상승 52주 고점 인근. 프라임 데이 기록 매출과 인도 퀵커머스 성장 CEO 업데이트로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $365.46 with post-market at $366.05. Price below all moving averages. Optimistic social sentiment highlighting AI revenue growth and viewing the sharp pullback to ~$367 as a buying opportunity at attractive valuations.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MSFT 전일종가 $365.46, 포스트 $366.05. 모든 이평선 아래. AI 매출 성장 강조와 $367 부근 저가 매수 기회로 낙관적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $293.08 with post-market at $293.20. Price below EMA21 yet EMA200 rising with golden cross retest near 52-week high. Neutral social sentiment on technical traders discussing ranging price action with mixed buy zones and potential pullbacks.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: AAPL 전일종가 $293.08, 포스트 $293.20. EMA21 아래이나 EMA200 상승 GC 재테스트 52주 고점 인근. 기술적 트레이더의 박스권 논의로 중립적 소셜 심리.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $345.29 with post-market at $344.90. Price below moving averages with EMA200 rising near 52-week high and RSI bullish divergence. Fearful social sentiment on Gemini 3.5 Pro delay to July and ongoing stock pullback.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: GOOGL 전일종가 $345.29, 포스트 $344.90. 이평선 아래 EMA200 상승 52주 고점 인근 RSI 상승 다이버전스. 제미니 3.5 프로 7월 지연과 주가 하락으로 두려운 소셜 심리.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Bounce from EMA200 $311.70 on RSI bullish divergence
